name: Winix 5500-2 True HEPA Air Purifier with PlasmaWave
tag: Best Air Purifier for Large Living Rooms
introText: The Winix 5500-2 covers 360 sq ft at 4 ACH with a washable pre-filter, auto mode that responds to actual air quality, sleep mode at 27.8 dBA, and PlasmaWave ionization technology — it has been consistently ranked among the best air purifiers in North America for 6+ years.

specs.Coverage: 360 sq ft at ACH 4 / 2140 sq ft at ACH 0.5
specs.Filtration: True HEPA 99.97% + Activated Carbon + Washable AOC Carbon pre-filter
specs.CADR: 243 CFM dust / 246 CFM smoke / 232 CFM pollen
specs.Auto Mode: AQI sensor — automatically adjusts fan speed

whatWorks: CADR 243 CFM is among the highest in this price tier — a higher CADR means faster air turnover, which matters for reducing allergen concentration during high-pollution events. The 5500-2 processes more air per minute than most competitors under $300.

Washable AOC carbon pre-filter eliminates one filter replacement entirely — while the HEPA and activated carbon filters need replacing annually, the fabric pre-filter washes in cold water and reinstalls. Over 5 years, this saves $50-75 in filter costs compared to purifiers with disposable pre-filters.

Auto mode responds to real particle sensor data — the 5500-2 automatically adjusts fan speed based on the air quality indicator within seconds of detecting elevated particle levels. This reactive approach outperforms simple timers or manual operation.

PlasmaWave ionization can be independently disabled — for users concerned about ozone from ionization, the PlasmaWave function has a dedicated on/off button. Running with PlasmaWave off uses only the HEPA and carbon filtration, which is the safer choice for household use.
worthKnowing: PlasmaWave creates trace ozone — while Winix states ozone output is within safe limits, households with asthma, infants, or individuals sensitive to ozone should disable PlasmaWave and use HEPA-only mode.

No app or WiFi connectivity on the 5500-2 — this is a fully manual + auto-mode unit. Remote control or schedule programming requires adding a smart plug. For native app control, consider the Levoit Core 400S.

Higher filter replacement cost than Levoit — annual filter replacement (~$50-60 CAD for HEPA + carbon set) is slightly higher than the Levoit Core 300 or 400S. The washable pre-filter partially offsets this over time.

Sleep mode indicator light stays on — the display doesn't fully dim during sleep mode, which can be distracting in dark bedrooms. A simple light-blocking solution (tape, small cover) resolves it but is slightly annoying.

commonComplaints.title: PlasmaWave produces trace ozone…
commonComplaints.body: PlasmaWave produces trace ozone — while within regulatory limits, ozone-sensitive individuals (asthma, infants) should disable PlasmaWave and run in HEPA-only mode.

commonComplaints.title: No app or WiFi for remote control…
commonComplaints.body: No app or WiFi for remote control or scheduling — the 5500-2 lacks smart home connectivity. Smart plug workarounds exist but don't expose fan speed or auto mode control.

commonComplaints.title: Display light stays on in sleep mode…
commonComplaints.body: Display light stays on in sleep mode — the indicator lights don't fully turn off, creating ambient light in dark bedrooms that some users find disruptive.

verdict: The Winix 5500-2 has earned its long-term bestseller status. Exceptional CADR, real auto mode, a washable pre-filter, and genuine reliability make it one of the best air purifiers you can buy in Canada under $300. The lack of app connectivity is its main gap versus Levoit; the PlasmaWave ozone concern is easily addressed by disabling it. If you want room air purification without complexity, this is the unit.

realBuyers.quote: Been running this 24/7 for 3 years. Replace the HEPA annually, wash the pre-filter monthly. Never had an issue and my allergies improved noticeably.
Auto mode works. I can see the indicator jump to high when my wife cooks something smoky, then settle back to low within 10 minutes. That's what I paid for.
Disabled PlasmaWave, runs quiet in sleep mode, keeps our bedroom HEPA-clean all night. Perfect for allergy season.

metaDescription: Winix 5500-2 review for Canada: CADR 243, True HEPA, washable pre-filter, auto mode, 360 sq ft at ACH 4, PlasmaWave. ~$269 CAD on Amazon.ca.
